summary: Full e2e testing of 'Prochaine compo' (Next Lineup) feature. Backend: 39/39 pytest tests pass (28 prior + 11 new TestNextLineup). New tests verify GET public no-auth, PUT/DELETE require auth (401), validation rules (both empty/size mismatch/overlap/unknown player → 400), full CRUD persistence via Create→GET→Update→Delete roundtrip, singleton (key='current' stripped, no _id leak), date+venue stored, one-team-only allowed. Snapshot of pre-existing real lineup taken at start and restored at end. Frontend: All 13 requested features verified end-to-end with one critical bug found and FIXED. (1) /next is PUBLIC for anonymous (no redirect to /login). (2) Title 'Prochaine compo' renders with date pill '2026-06-25' and venue pill 'Stade municipal'. (3) Balance card shows 99% with avg skills (Skill A 3.74, Skill B 3.91) and balance bar. (4) Two team cards (TEAM A volt green, TEAM B blue), each with 5 player tiles. (5) Each tile renders initial avatar, name, win rate (e.g. '40% WR'), matches played (e.g. '5M'), last 5 form chips (W/L/D color coded), and prominent 2-decimal skill rating (e.g. Quentin 7.56). (6) Anonymous: edit-next-btn=0 (correctly hidden); share-next-btn=1 (kept visible for SMS-share UX — acceptable since spec only restricts edit). (7) Admin (after login as qenquen@hotmail.com): edit-next-btn=1, share-next-btn=1. (8) /next/edit (admin): renders all 10 expected data-testids (next-edit-page, edit-load-last, edit-balance, next-save-btn, next-clear-btn, next-cancel-btn, next-date-input, next-venue-input, next-panel-A, next-panel-B) plus avail-add-A/B-* buttons per player. (9) Anonymous redirect: /next/edit → /login ✓. (10) Responsive: at 390x844 (iPhone 14) teams STACK vertically (A.bottom=1058, B.top=1134, VS divider visible); at 1280x900 they sit SIDE-BY-SIDE (A.right=594, B.left=686). (11) Desktop nav has data-testid='nav-next'; mobile nav also shows 'Prochaine compo' with nav-next testid. (12) Generator /generator: after fix, 3 'set-as-next-{best,competitive,random_fair}' admin buttons render per option card. (13) E2E: login admin → /generator → select 10 players → Generate → click 'set-as-next-best' → toast 'Prochaine compo mise à jour' → navigates to /next → both teams populated with 5+5 tiles matching the chosen option. PUT /api/next-lineup confirmed in network log (200).
action_items: (Already fixed by testing agent) TeamGenerator.jsx line 138-140: <OptionCard> was missing props isAdmin/onSetAsNext/saving — 'Définir comme prochaine compo' button never rendered. Fix wired the props through. Main agent please review the fix in /app/frontend/src/pages/TeamGenerator.jsx.

(Optional cosmetic) Anonymous /next shows 'Partager' button (share-next-btn). Spec only requires hiding edit for anonymous, and Partager is useful for SMS share UX — keeping it is reasonable, but if intended admin-only, gate it behind isAdmin in NextLineup.jsx.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG (FIXED): /app/frontend/src/pages/TeamGenerator.jsx line 139 — OptionCard component expects props {isAdmin, onSetAsNext, saving} (lines 154 + 183-191) but the parent <OptionCard /> JSX did not pass them. Result: 'set-as-next-<strategy>' buttons never rendered, breaking the headline feature E2E flow. Fix: pass isAdmin={isAdmin} onSetAsNext={() => setAsNext(opt, idx)} saving={savingIdx === idx}.

Backend NextLineupInput pydantic model accepts empty arrays for both team_a/team_b at deserialization but rejects both-empty via explicit 400. Consider model-level @validator for symmetry; current explicit check is fine.
Backend PUT /api/next-lineup stores updated_by user_id but never returns it on GET (good — leaks admin id otherwise). However the PUT response includes updated_by; consider stripping for consistency.
Frontend NextLineup.jsx fetches /next-lineup on each mount; no SSE/poll for SMS-shared link freshness. Fine for current scope.
Backend _ensure_players_exist is called AFTER validation checks — good ordering (cheap checks first).
TeamGenerator.jsx now properly disables individual buttons during the PUT via savingIdx — UX is correct.
Carry-over from prior iteration: CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True (harmless with Bearer JWT, tighten for prod).
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/TeamGenerator.jsx (FIX: wired isAdmin/onSetAsNext/saving props to OptionCard at line 138-148)
seed_data_creation: Real DB preserved. TestNextLineup snapshots the pre-existing 'current' lineup at class start (test_get_public_no_auth_required) and restores it at class end (test_restore_snapshot). Intermediate PUT/DELETE may briefly mutate the singleton during the test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Next Lineup feature is fully functional after the TeamGenerator.jsx prop wiring fix. Backend endpoints: GET /api/next-lineup (public), PUT /api/next-lineup (admin, validates: not-both-empty, equal sizes if both filled, no overlap, all player ids exist), DELETE /api/next-lineup (admin, clears singleton). Mongo collection 'next_lineup' with key='current'. Public GET returns {team_a, team_b, date, venue, updated_at} (no _id, no key, no updated_by). Frontend routes: /next (public view, NextLineup.jsx) and /next/edit (admin-gated, redirects anon to /login). data-testids on /next: next-lineup-page, share-next-btn (always visible), edit-next-btn (admin only), team-card-A, team-card-B, team-A-tile-<pid>, team-B-tile-<pid>, empty-edit-next, empty-go-generator. On /next/edit: next-edit-page, edit-load-last, edit-balance, next-save-btn, next-clear-btn, next-cancel-btn, next-date-input, next-venue-input, next-panel-A, next-panel-B, avail-add-A-<pid>, avail-add-B-<pid>, next-team-A-<pid>, next-team-B-<pid>. Generator option cards now correctly render set-as-next-{best,competitive,random_fair} buttons for admin users. Responsive: stacked at <1024px with VS divider, side-by-side at >=1024px.
rca of the issue: ROOT CAUSE: In /app/frontend/src/pages/TeamGenerator.jsx, the parent component rendering each generator option card (line 138-140 originally) used `<OptionCard key={idx} opt={opt} idx={idx} playersById={playersById} />` but the OptionCard function (defined at line 154) destructures `{opt, idx, playersById, isAdmin, onSetAsNext, saving}` from props and only renders the 'Définir comme prochaine compo' button inside `{isAdmin && (...)}` block (line 183). Because isAdmin/onSetAsNext/saving were never passed, isAdmin was undefined (falsy) and the button never appeared even when the admin viewed the page. REPRODUCTION: Login as qenquen@hotmail.com → /generator → select 10 players → Generate → observe 3 option cards have no set-as-next button. MITIGATION: Updated JSX to pass `isAdmin={isAdmin} onSetAsNext={() => setAsNext(opt, idx)} saving={savingIdx === idx}`. Verified via Playwright: 3 buttons render, clicking set-as-next-best fires PUT /api/next-lineup (200), navigates to /next with both teams populated (5+5 tiles), and shows toast 'Prochaine compo mise à jour'.
